name: Animal-Free Science Advocacy
summary: Organisation championing ethical scientific research without animals.
description: Relevant for scientific integrity, replacement methods, research policy and campaigns against avoidable animal use in science.
alignment: Listed because its replacement-focused science advocacy overlaps with Bite Back's welfare and evidence standards.
